summary: A clip of a man in a dark suit and pink tie speaking at a lectern with a microphone in an ornate room with U.S. and military flags behind him and a framed portrait on the wall. The footage stays on the speaker throughout as he delivers remarks.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit speaks at a lectern in an ornate room with flags and a framed portrait behind him.
The speaker continues his remarks at the microphone.
Continued footage of the speaker at the lectern.
